tasks.package:windows: deno eval "await Deno.mkdir('release', { recursive: true });" && deno compile --app-name PackageRunner --target x86_64-pc-windows-msvc --output ./release/PackageRunner.exe --allow-read --allow-write --allow-run --allow-env --include ./release/payload-manifest.json ./desktop/main.ts
tasks.package:windows:gui: deno eval "await Deno.mkdir('release', { recursive: true });" && deno compile --app-name PackageRunner --target x86_64-pc-windows-msvc --output ./release/PackageRunner-gui.exe --no-terminal --allow-read --allow-write --allow-run --allow-env --include ./release/payload-manifest.json ./desktop/main.ts
tasks.package:mac:arm: deno eval "await Deno.mkdir('release', { recursive: true });" && deno compile --app-name PackageRunner --target aarch64-apple-darwin --output ./release/PackageRunner-macos-arm64 --allow-read --allow-write --allow-run --allow-env --include ./release/payload-manifest.json ./desktop/main.ts
